description: decay.rally_patterns.half_life → 9: Rally patterns decay is completely untested; aggressive reduction from 18mo to 9mo will weight recent rally-construction sequences more heavily to capture tactical adaptation on hard courts where opponents adjust patterns match-to-match, targeting the unexamined temporal weighting in rally structure that masks serve-dependent point-construction signals after 17 consecutive neutral/revert experiments across confidence, cluster, window, and pressure/shot-type decay categories.
